# text / table

The **text** type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "text", ... })` — a read-only
`TextCell` that renders the projected value as single-line truncating text.
Derived text types (e.g. `multiline-text`) reuse this cell via the
`extends`-chain fallback.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Text field type: data-view table cell (read-only text cell).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "text" → `TextCell`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`
